posts.author: ero1229 (Erin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

I have 8 boards totalling `2,000 items. I have one item that has ~100 items across said boards that are dependent on it, but I can’t know/see that anywhere on my board.

Thank you!

What are you trying to achieve

Today there is no native way to see all items that depend on a given item across boards. An item can have many downstream dependencies on other boards, but those relationships are invisible unless teams manually maintain a separate tracking board.

Request:
Provide a way to view reverse dependencies for an item across boards. This could be a “Dependent items” section in the item view or a reverse lookup for Connect Boards and Dependency columns.

This would significantly improve impact analysis and risk management for large, multi-board programs like mine.
